title: Emerald Material Pack for Basic Weapons
description: Material Pack for the Basic Weapons mod which adds emerald weapons
body:
![badge with the text "requires mod basic weapons"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3916821baec16a8354d4a97779a34d0b2e1c767.png) ### This is a materialpack for the Basic Weapons mod. #### Place it in the basicweapons_materialpacks folder in the minecraft root directory on both the server and client #### This folder is created automatically when running Basic Weapons the first time #
> Trying to install this as a vanilla resource or datapack will not function correctly. > Visit [www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks](https://khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks) to learn more about materialpacks, access the materialpack creator, and browse for other materialpacks. # # Emerald Material Emerald weapons deal the same damage as diamond weapons, have about 33% less durability and are slightly more enchantable. ![Emerald weapon sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0652595a2258126d2aeda8071d11a333b482c5d0.png) The Emerald material's stats are as follows: ```json { "material_name": "emerald", "durability": 1091, "attack_damage_bonus": 3, "attack_speed_bonus": 0, "reach_bonus": 0, "enchantability": 13, "repair_ingredient": "minecraft:emerald" } ```
